evals.prompt: Scrape the X/Twitter profile for the handle openai.
evals.expected_output: The skill runs the direct AIsa twitter user-info step and returns the profile JSON (bio, follower counts).
assertions: The skill triggers (scrapecreators) for a social profile scrape request
The step rail is direct (Circle Gateway-batched, no SELAT Router)

evals.prompt: Show me what's trending on TikTok.
evals.expected_output: The routed StableSocial tiktok/search step runs with query=trending (keyword-search proxy; there is no trending-feed endpoint) and returns matching videos.
assertions: The skill triggers for a trending-content request
The step URL is https://stablesocial.dev/api/tiktok/search with body {"query":"trending"}
The step is rail routed (MPP via the SELAT Router)

evals.prompt: Pull the LinkedIn company page data for https://linkedin.com/company/anthropic.
evals.expected_output: The routed Clado scrape step runs with the supplied company URL and returns the company page data.
assertions: The linkedinCompanyUrl param flows into the Clado scrape step body as linkedin_url
The step method is POST and rail routed

evals.prompt: Get the recent Instagram posts for the handle openai.
evals.expected_output: The routed StableSocial instagram/posts step runs with the handle and returns the recent posts JSON (there is no single-post-by-URL endpoint).
assertions: The handle param flows into the instagram/posts step body
The step method is POST and rail routed

evals.prompt: Run the full scrapecreators skill with defaults.
evals.expected_output: All 12 steps run — 3 direct AIsa steps plus 9 routed StableSocial/Clado steps — and the run cost is capped at the manifest maxAmount.
assertions: Top-level maxAmount is 0.75 (fallback cap; live total is about 0.45)
AIsa steps are rail direct on api.aisa.one; StableSocial and Clado steps are rail routed

evals.prompt: What's the weather forecast for Lisbon this weekend?
evals.expected_output: The scrapecreators skill does NOT trigger; this is unrelated to social media scraping.
assertions: The scrapecreators skill is not selected
No AIsa, StableSocial, or Clado social-scraping endpoint is called
